message:
fix(build): add search_explain module declaration and storage methods

HEAD was broken because main.rs referenced wa_core::search_explain but
lib.rs lacked the module declaration. Adds pub mod search_explain to
lib.rs, three storage methods (get_gaps, get_retention_cleanup_count,
get_segment_time_range) needed by the module, and fixes a clippy
or_fun_call warning in search_explain.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
